creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 236661
2022-09-05 pkg upgrade messages

(In reply to Henry Hu from comment #14)

> … (given that you have an old version, I assume it was upgraded). …

Yes, around five days after the upgrade was ported. 

% zgrep ibus\ upgrade /var/log/messages.2.bz2
Sep  5 20:28:40 mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd pkg[57529]: ibus upgraded: 1.5.24_1 -> 1.5.27 
% 


> If you still remember how you installed it 

It would have been a routine upgrade. My habit:

create a boot environment
mount the environment at /tmp/up
pkg -r /tmp/up upgrade
pkg -r /tmp/up clean -a
pkg -r /tmp/up autoremove
unmount, activate … restart

Attached: relevant messages from the day.


> and if anything unexpected happened during the install / upgrade, 

Nothing that I recall. 


> For example, maybe there was an unclean shutdown / power loss, 

No. 

Thanks again; I'll close.
